AR1.justification: Triage routed to daybook with Intent/Log/Handoff sections; rationale spells out why no decisions, observations, or project files were created (criteria not met), and why followups.md statuses were left to Monday's working session.

AR3.justification: Relative path references (`followups.md`, `daybook/2026-05-17.md`, `projects/`) with ISO date anchor; all resolve.

AR4.justification: Daybook entry is date-keyed and append-shaped (Intent/Log/Handoff); Handoff includes a conditional project-trigger flag for Tuesday, which is forward-compatible rather than mutating existing state.
